description: High top denim sneakers for women from catwalk. These stylish sneakers exude an all-American charm with their faded denim upper, pink inner and heart shape cutouts at the midfoot. Wear these with denim capris, shorts or pants and a tonal top or tee. UpperHigh top faded denim upper with metal eyelets at the midfootCentral laceups Heart shaped cutouts at the midfoot and back foot MidsolePU midsole with textured PU foxingOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with patterned grooves shoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
